# Using this template

Thank you for starting from **AI Engineering Framework (AEF) v1.0**.

## Quick start

```bash
npm install
npm run setup
# Optional: npm run setup -- --name "Your Product Name"
```

Fill in `.env.local`, run Supabase migrations, then `npm run dev`.

## Full guide

See **[docs/TEMPLATE-SETUP.md](../docs/TEMPLATE-SETUP.md)** for the complete checklist.

## Cursor

> Read PROJECT_CONSTITUTION.md and follow it.

## v0 UI

Import designs per **[docs/V0-IMPORT-GUIDE.md](../docs/V0-IMPORT-GUIDE.md)** — do not replace the whole repo with a v0 export.
